title: Kanban Board · Diagonal Axis
summary: A Swiss / Minimal Kanban board on a warm near-white canvas with near-black ink and a single red accent: a strict orthogonal grid of hairline rules and flat near-square cards set in an austere system sans, structured by a disciplined 45-degree diagonal axis. Red diamonds and a diagonal slash mark the brand, the active column, high priority, and selection as structural alignment devices, never decoration pasted onto cards.
